item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p09","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant brakes the N+1 local repair immediately, names the repeated downstream split pattern across exchange, points, preorder, and gift inquiries, refuses a new gift processing口 as the default, and moves upstream to unified intake ownership, root-cause diagnosis, and consolidated staffing/routing. It does not provide an implementation step for opening the requested new channel."}
